sub_mechanisms: M_1: define a slot taxonomy with families {cyclic, alternating, Lie-type-A_n, Lie-type-B_n, Lie-type-D_n, sporadic-1..26}
M_2: train a classifier to route each long-term-memory entry to a slot
M_4: cross-slot fusion via a small attention over slot representatives
stripped_llm_application: A memory bank partitioned along a finite-classification taxonomy (~30 slots) with classifier-based routing and a cross-slot fusion attention layer. Each slot specializes in a different symmetry family of inputs.
novelty_claim_stripped: MoE and structured retrieval already use slots. The candidate uses a specific 30-slot taxonomy motivated by FSG classification, with sporadic slots for exceptional inputs.
